_doc: Known-vulnerable / EOL base images. Used by container.js to flag Dockerfile FROM lines using EOL distros.

3.10.message: Alpine 3.10 reached end of life on 2021-05-01. No security patches since.

latest.message: alpine:latest is a floating tag — pin to a specific minor version (e.g. alpine:3.21) for reproducible builds.

9.message: Debian 9 (Stretch) reached EOL on 2022-06-30. No security updates.

stretch.message: Debian Stretch reached EOL on 2022-06-30. No security updates.

10.message: Debian 10 (Buster) reached EOL on 2024-06-30. No security updates.

buster.message: Debian Buster reached EOL on 2024-06-30. No security updates.

11.message: Debian 11 (Bullseye) reaches EOL on 2026-06-30. Plan migration to Bookworm.

latest.message: debian:latest is a floating tag — pin to a release codename (e.g. debian:bookworm-slim).

16.04.message: Ubuntu 16.04 LTS reached EOL on 2021-04-30. No security updates.

20.04.message: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS reaches standard support EOL on 2025-04-30.

latest.message: ubuntu:latest is a floating tag — pin to an LTS (e.g. ubuntu:22.04 or ubuntu:24.04).

12.message: Node.js 12 reached EOL on 2022-04-30. No security patches.

latest.message: node:latest is a floating tag — pin to an LTS (e.g. node:22-alpine).

2.message: Python 2 reached EOL on 2020-01-01. Migrate to Python 3.

latest.message: python:latest is a floating tag — pin to a specific minor (e.g. python:3.12-slim).
